title: King and Queen Fall Back
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16, Luffy as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can get just about anything else no prob- Lem...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but the only buckwheat flour I can find is average at best.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh no! The contest hasn't even begun and already we're behind on quality?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, then let me go steal some for you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hear paradise farm is bursting with top- quality foods.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Uh, no.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thievery's a no go when it comes to chef battles.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Besides, acquiring top-notch ingredients is part of a chef's job.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't fault Haraguroya on that, at least.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, I know! Let's spread the word around town about how they skimp on their flour quality.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: If we do that, then ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the last thing we need to do.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Think about the ladies who paid good money for those noodles.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If the truth gets out and people realize they got duped...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...you'll shame them in front of every- body.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmmm! The pride of a good, honest meal!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is why I like you so much!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Good question. We can't beat them on flour quality.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: So what do we do now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Which means ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...we need to find some other way to beat them on taste.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: She has a point.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Paradise farms having all the food supplies firmly under their thumb makes this rough.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What else is there?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What flavors do I have that they don't?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHAT INGRE- DIENTS CAN I FIND THAT PARADISE FARMS CAN'T?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The beach.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Sbloosh

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah. I was so spaced-out I didn't realize I'd walked all the way to kuri.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think this is where Luffy said he washed up?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I'm surprised he survived the trip.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: #1 Sky

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: SEVERAL DAYS LATER...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Hey, didja hear?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: There's a battle between SOBA stalls tonight.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're fighting over the right to sell on a certain corner.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: That sounds inter- eating!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What, really? A brawl of flavor over fists, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fights and fires are Wano's biggest forms of entertain- ment! We have to watch!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Yeah! Let's go!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 41 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
